case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. KOKI YOSHIDA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ANNETTE NEWBERRY RE: CCP 585; EVID 1550; & CCP 1033 - IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
